name: Tic Tac Toe — Unbeatable AI Player
description: Plays Tic Tac Toe on Google by searching for it, then uses minimax strategy via codeExecute to make optimal moves. The bot never loses. Shows off AI-like decision making + browser interaction.

step.description: Open a Tic Tac Toe game
Max moves in tic tac toe
Read board state and make the best move using minimax
step.code: const cells = document.querySelectorAll('.board .square, td, [class*="cell"], [class*="square"]'); if (cells.length < 9) return 'Board not found'; const board = Array.from(cells).map(c => { const text = c.textContent.trim().toUpperCase(); if (text === 'X') return 'X'; if (text === 'O') return 'O'; return ''; }); function checkWin(b, p) { const w = [[0,1,2],[3,4,5],[6,7,8],[0,3,6],[1,4,7],[2,5,8],[0,4,8],[2,4,6]]; return w.some(l => l.every(i => b[i] === p)); } function minimax(b, isMax) { if (checkWin(b, 'X')) return -10; if (checkWin(b, 'O')) return 10; if (b.every(c => c)) return 0; let best = isMax ? -Infinity : Infinity; for (let i = 0; i < 9; i++) { if (!b[i]) { b[i] = isMax ? 'O' : 'X'; const score = minimax(b, !isMax); best = isMax ? Math.max(best, score) : Math.min(best, score); b[i] = ''; } } return best; } let bestMove = -1, bestScore = -Infinity; for (let i = 0; i < 9; i++) { if (!board[i]) { board[i] = 'O'; const score = minimax(board, false); board[i] = ''; if (score > bestScore) { bestScore = score; bestMove = i; } } } if (bestMove >= 0) { cells[bestMove].click(); return 'Played position ' + bestMove; } return 'No move available';

const cells = document.querySelectorAll('.board .square, td, [class*="cell"], [class*="square"]'); const board = Array.from(cells).map(c => { const t = c.textContent.trim().toUpperCase(); return t === 'X' ? 'X' : t === 'O' ? 'O' : ''; }); const wins = [[0,1,2],[3,4,5],[6,7,8],[0,3,6],[1,4,7],[2,5,8],[0,4,8],[2,4,6]]; for (const w of wins) { if (w.every(i => board[i] === 'O')) return 'WIN'; if (w.every(i => board[i] === 'X')) return 'LOSS'; } if (board.every(c => c)) return 'DRAW'; const status = document.querySelector('[class*="status"], [class*="result"], .game-over'); if (status && status.textContent.trim()) return status.textContent.trim(); return 'PLAYING';
